title: STATE EMERGENCY REGISTRY OF VOLUNTEERS IN OREGON - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION STATE EMERGENCY REGISTRY OF VOLUNTEERS IN OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the State of Oregon roster of licensed medical professionals who have registered to volunteer in response to local, state, or federal emergencies. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Licensed physicians, nurses, pharmacists, Emergency Medical Technicians (EMTs), behavioral health providers, respiratory therapists, and other medical care providers. -Previously licensed medical professionals may be required to attend additional training, and a background check is required prior to activation. - Medical professionals licensed in another state; see website for volunteer requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (877) 343-5767 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 343-5767 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disaster Related Volunteer Preparedness/Mobilization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ALERT IMMUNIZATION INFORMATION SYSTEM COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES CONSUMER REGULATION - OREGON VITAL RECORDS CONSUMER REGULATION - OREGON MEDICAL MARIJUANA PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES FOR CHILDREN SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OREGON HOPELINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO QUIT LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION
